Small But Mighty: The Best-Selling Sonus Faber Concertino G4

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingSmall But Mighty: The Best-Selling Sonus Faber Concertino G4Posted on July 31, 2024Small But Mighty: The Best-Selling Sonus Faber Concertino G4Are you looking to upgrade your home audio setup without needing an extensive array of speakers or a cabinet full of equipment? Meet the Sonus Faber Concertino G4, a compact yet powerful speaker that‚Äôs perfect for audiophiles who appreciate high-quality sound in a sleek design.‚ÄçSonus Faber Concertino G4‚ÄçExceptional Sound QualityThe Concertino G4 is a two-way passive loudspeaker that delivers impressive audio performance. With a 1-inch silk dome tweeter featuring D.A.D. technology and a 5-inch long-throw paper pulp midwoofer, this speaker ensures precise and dynamic sound. Its unique structure, incorporating cork and walnut, minimizes internal resonances, providing clarity and depth to your listening experience.‚ÄçSustainable and Stylish DesignSonus Faber emphasizes sustainability with the Concertino G4. The speaker features finishings made from a plant-based leather alternative by Ohoskin and recycled cork. The walnut side panels and ribbed surfaces not only enhance the speaker‚Äôs durability but also add a touch of elegance, making it a standout piece in any room.‚ÄçSonus Faber Concertino G4‚ÄçGenuine Italian CraftsmanshipSonus Faber speakers are renowned for their Italian craftsmanship, combining artisanal quality with advanced acoustic research. The Concertino G4 is no exception, offering a product that reflects the dedication and expertise of Italian design and manufacturing.‚ÄçKey FeaturesAdvanced Acoustics: The aluminum rings around the tweeter and midwoofer, along with a reflex duct made of walnut wood, highlight the speaker‚Äôs sophisticated design.‚ÄçSimplified Crossover: Ensuring accurate phase alignment, the simplified crossover design offers a more defined and three-dimensional sound image.‚ÄçCompact Power: Despite its small size, the Concertino G4 delivers powerful and immersive sound, making it ideal for audiophiles who want top-tier audio quality without a bulky setup.‚ÄçSonus Faber Concertino G4‚ÄçSpecial EditionTo commemorate the 30th anniversary of the Concertino line, Sonus Faber is releasing a limited run of 300 pairs of the Concertino G4 "Maestro" edition. This special edition, priced at $5000 per pair, features a brass plaque with progressive numbering, offering a unique and exclusive audio experience. The optional stand, designed to complement the speaker‚Äôs aesthetics, is available for $1500 per pair.‚Äç‚ÄçConclusionElevating your home audio experience doesn‚Äôt have to involve a complex or cumbersome setup. The Sonus Faber Concertino G4 offers a perfect blend of heritage, innovation, and sustainable design, making it an ideal choice for those who want exceptional sound quality in a compact and stylish package. Discover how the Concertino G4 can transform your listening experience and bring the essence of high-fidelity audio into your home. Happy listening!‚ÄçIf you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚ÄçServices:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‚ÄçProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley‚ÄçEngage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright ¬© 2023.
